formulas.label: fd24
formulas.latex: \Phi = \underset{\left(x , r , h\right) \in X^{'}}{min} \sum_{i = 0}^{m} \left\{f^{i} \left(x^{i} , r^{i} , h^{i}\right) \right) + \underset{j \neq i}{\sum} \underset{s \in \mathcal{N}_{i} \cap \mathcal{N}_{j}}{\sum} \left[\underset{t \in \mathcal{T}_{\rightarrow s}^{i} \cup \mathcal{T}_{s \rightarrow}^{i}}{\sum}\right) \left\{\lambda_{r , i j}^{s , t}\right) \left(\left[r_{t , s}^{i} - r_{t , s}^{j}\right) + \lambda_{h , i j}^{s , t} \left[h_{t , s}^{i} - h_{t , s}^{j}\right]\right\} + \underset{t \in \mathcal{T}_{\rightarrow s}^{i}}{\sum} \left(\lambda_{x 1 , i j}^{s , t} \left[\underset{b \in A_{t , p}}{\sum} \alpha \left(b\right) x_{b}^{i} - \underset{b \in D_{t , p}}{\sum} \delta \left(b\right) x_{b}^{j}\right]\right) \left(+ \lambda_{x 2 , i j}^{s , t} \left[\underset{b \in A_{t , p}}{\sum} v \alpha \left(b\right) x_{b}^{i} - \underset{b \in D_{t , p}}{\sum} v \delta \left(b\right) x_{b}^{j}\right]\right)
